creator: rkhetan@juniper.net
text:
Hi,

I have upgrade my device from BSD6 to BSD12 and facing performance, Issue.
As per my debug I am seen TLB Miss in BSD12 in comparison no TLB miss in BSD6.

Will you guys suggest how to delt with this, any kernel tuning.
We are using 2Mhuge pages.

Appreciate your response on this.

Regards,
Rajeev Khetan
